metadata.description: A suite of focused, original Claude Code skills.

plugins.name: godmode
plugins.description: One-word max-capability mode: maps and uses the best available tool, stays exhaustive, verifies before claiming done, persists context.

plugins.name: adversarial-verify
plugins.description: Proves a code change works by trying to break it: writes and runs falsification tests, returns a binary PASS/FAIL/INCONCLUSIVE verdict.

plugins.name: skill-security-scan
plugins.description: Statically vets a third-party SKILL.md, its hooks, and the settings.json it would register before install, returning an ALLOW/REVIEW/BLOCK verdict. Ships an install-guard hook that auto-runs the scan whenever you go to install a skill or plugin.

plugins.name: scheduled-sop-runner
plugins.description: Turns a repeatable SOP into a self-checking scheduled routine that verifies each run and notifies you only when something fails.

plugins.name: docs-drift-sync
plugins.description: Keeps docs in sync with changed code: maps changed symbols/flags/endpoints to their doc mentions, detects drift, proposes minimal edits.

plugins.name: geo-aeo-audit
plugins.description: Audits a page for citability by AI answer engines and outputs paste-ready structure (definition block, JSON-LD, FAQ). Scoped to AEO.

plugins.name: content-repurpose-engine
plugins.description: Turns one source asset into 8-10 platform-native posts (LinkedIn, X, Instagram, short-form, newsletter), source-faithful.

plugins.name: weekly-ai-digest
plugins.description: Produces a sourced, skimmable weekly AI roundup from the last 7 days across multiple sources, ranked by signal, every claim linked.

plugins.name: salve
plugins.description: Ship and persist your work in one word: persist context, commit, push, PR+merge to main, deploy, ff-update local, report evidence.

plugins.name: safety-net
plugins.description: Automatic reversible git checkpoints around Claude's edits: snapshots the working tree before every edit so you can say 'undo' and roll back.

plugins.name: testsmith
plugins.description: Adversarial test generation: reproduce the bug with a failing test first, then a test-vs-mutant loop yields FEW high-value tests tied to the change, not many shallow ones.

plugins.name: model-router
plugins.description: Cost-aware model routing: send cheap subtasks to Sonnet/Haiku and reserve Opus for design, hard debugging, and verification, to cut token cost.

plugins.name: context-warden
plugins.description: Runtime context-rot defense: observation masking, an ACE-style compaction playbook, and a lean session overlay that keeps the working set small.

plugins.name: sync
plugins.description: Check installed Claude Code skills against the latest published GitHub version and report drift; with your OK, sync the outdated public ones.

plugins.name: mcp-warden
plugins.description: Vet an MCP server before enabling it: security & compatibility sheet, static scan of the server as hostile data, and an ALLOW/REVIEW/BLOCK verdict. The MCP sibling of skill-security-scan.

plugins.name: orchestrate
plugins.description: Plan -> spec -> build -> verify orchestration with a hard approval gate and a verify check on every step, built on the Workflow tool. Ships a runnable workflow template.

plugins.name: recall
plugins.description: Zero-dependency MCP server for cross-session memory recall: lexical search/list/get over your Claude memory files. No native deps, no SDK.

plugins.name: run-cost
plugins.description: Pre-flight token/cost estimate for a whole task or workflow before you run it: agent count x model tier x context size, with a cheaper-shape proposal.

plugins.name: multi-repo-context
plugins.description: Declare a set of repos in scope and how they relate; gives the agent a scope manifest so it edits the right repo. Pairs with the recall MCP for cross-repo memory.

plugins.name: headless-mcp-bridge
plugins.description: Make scheduled, cron, and headless runs reach your MCP servers: register at user scope, pre-approve tools, and verify with claude mcp list. A config playbook.
